name: geomag

metadata.name: geomag
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Library or Lesser General Public License (LGPL)

documentation:
Magnetic variation/declination
        ------------------------------
        
        Calculates magnetic variation/declination for any latitude/longitude/altitude, for any date. Uses the NOAA National Geophysical Data Center, epoch 2015 data.

modules.name: geomag
documentation:
geomag package
by Christopher Weiss <mailto:cmweiss@gmail.com>

Adapted from the geomagc software and World Magnetic Model of the NOAA
Satellite and Information Service, National Geophysical Data Center
<http://www.ngdc.noaa.gov/geomag/WMM/DoDWMM.shtml>

Suggestions for improvements are appreciated.

USAGE:
\>>> import geomag
\>>> geomag.declination(80,0)
-6.1335150785195536

functions.name: geomag.declination
documentation:
Calculate magnetic declination in degrees
dlat = latitude in degrees
dlon = longitude in degrees
h = altitude in feet, default=0
calc_date = date for computing declination, default=today

functions.name: geomag.mag_heading
documentation:
Calculates the magnetic heading from a true heading.
hdg = true heading in degrees
All other parameters are the same as declination.

modules.name: geomag.geomag
documentation: Adapted from the geomagc software and World Magnetic Model of the NOAA
Satellite and Information Service, National Geophysical Data Center
